daily.topThemeBody: Skills coverage widens: ISTELive 26's six-role "AI-Ready Graduate" is joined by Inside Higher Ed's finding that career literacy is worth roughly $40K a year, the RAISE US reskilling drive, EdSurge's call to support "whole educators" against burnout, experts urging leaders to defend E-Rate, and 1EdTech research on scaling digital credentials.

heroWeek.themeBody: ISTELive 26 keeps generating skills coverage: EdTech Magazine and EdSurge unpack the six-role "AI-Ready Graduate" and a "relational intelligence" recap, experts urge leaders to defend E-Rate broadband funding, Inside Higher Ed's RAISE US targets workforce reskilling, and 1EdTech advances research on scaling digital credentials.
heroWeek.themeProp: graduation cap over a small network of nodes
